Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
56 
RX_SRVC_RFRNC_NUM 
LABEL: 
RX Service Reference Number 
DESCRIPTION: This field contains the prescription reference number assigned by the pharmacy at the time the 
prescription is filled. 
SHORT NAME: SRVRFNUM 
LONG NAME: RX_SRVC_RFRNC_NUM 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Field length expanded from 10 to 12 in 2011.
